description: Agent asks vendor to clarify which invoice a payment applies to, vendor responds, agent processes

turns.subject: Payment Received
turns.body:
Hi,

We received a payment of $4,200.00 from your company. Could you let us know which invoice this applies to? We have several open ones on your account.

Thanks,
Lisa Wang
BuildRight Construction

turns.subject: RE: Payment Received
turns.body:
Hi Lisa,

Could you share the open invoice numbers on our account so we can match the payment?

Regards,
AP Team

turns.subject: RE: RE: Payment Received
turns.body:
Sure! Here are the open invoices:
- INV-BR-1010: $4,200.00 (due Feb 15)
- INV-BR-1015: $4,200.00 (due Mar 1)
- INV-BR-1022: $1,800.00 (due Mar 15)

Let me know which one to apply it to.

Thanks,
Lisa

turns.subject: RE: RE: RE: Payment Received
turns.body:
Hi Lisa,

Please apply the $4,200.00 payment to INV-BR-1010.

Regards,
AP Team

_grading_notes: Key test: agent must retain the $4,200.00 payment amount from turn 1 through to turn 4 without re-asking. All three invoices should be extracted from turn 3, but only INV-BR-1010 should be marked as resolved.

description: Amount mismatch triggers escalation, human provides guidance, agent sends follow-up to vendor

turns.subject: RE: Invoice #INV-GP-3301 - Correction
turns.body:
Hello,

We need to correct Invoice #INV-GP-3301. The original amount was $6,500.00 but should be $9,100.00 due to additional parts shipped on Feb 12 (see delivery note DN-4455).

Please update your records.

Regards,
Mike Torres
Global Parts Inc.

turns.subject: Escalation: Amount correction requested for INV-GP-3301
turns.body: Vendor requests amount change from $6,500.00 to $9,100.00 (+$2,600.00) citing additional shipment DN-4455. Requires approval before updating.

turns.subject: RE: Escalation: Amount correction requested for INV-GP-3301
turns.body: Confirmed — DN-4455 is valid, we did receive the additional parts. Approve the correction to $9,100.00. Send confirmation to vendor.

turns.subject: RE: Invoice #INV-GP-3301 - Correction Approved
turns.body:
Hi Mike,

We've verified delivery note DN-4455 and updated Invoice #INV-GP-3301 to the corrected amount of $9,100.00.

Payment will be processed per standard terms.

Regards,
AP Team

_grading_notes: Tests the full escalation lifecycle. Agent must: (1) detect the mismatch and escalate, (2) incorporate human guidance, (3) send correct follow-up. Grade partial credit if escalation is correct but follow-up is wrong.

description: Vendor reveals information across 3 emails — agent must accumulate context before processing

turns.subject: Outstanding Balance
turns.body:
Hi,

Just a heads-up that you have an outstanding balance with us. I'll send the details shortly.

Regards,
Priya Sharma
Northwind Traders

turns.subject: RE: Outstanding Balance - Invoice Number
turns.body:
The invoice number is INV-NW-8820.

- Priya

turns.subject: RE: RE: Outstanding Balance - Full Details
turns.body:
Sorry for the multiple emails! Here are the full details:

Invoice: INV-NW-8820
Amount: $3,750.00
PO Reference: PO-2290
Due Date: March 30, 2024
Terms: Net-30

Please confirm receipt and expected payment date.

Thanks,
Priya

_grading_notes: Agent should NOT process after turn 1 (no actionable info) or turn 2 (incomplete). Only turn 3 has enough info to extract and respond. Test that the agent doesn't hallucinate an amount from turns 1-2. The single invoice should appear once, not three times.

description: Out-of-office triggers contact with alternate, who resolves the original question

turns.subject: Invoice #INV-VND-5501 - Payment Terms Clarification
turns.body:
Hi John,

Could you confirm the payment terms for Invoice #INV-VND-5501 ($2,800.00)? Our records show Net-30 but the invoice states Net-15.

Regards,
AP Team

turns.subject: Out of Office: RE: Invoice #INV-VND-5501 - Payment Terms Clarification
turns.body:
Thank you for your email. I am out of the office until April 5th.

For billing inquiries, please contact Angela Park at apark@vendor.com.

Best,
John Doe

turns.subject: FW: Invoice #INV-VND-5501 - Payment Terms Clarification
turns.body:
Hi Angela,

John is out of office and directed billing inquiries to you. Could you confirm the payment terms for Invoice #INV-VND-5501 ($2,800.00)? We see Net-30 in our records but the invoice states Net-15.

Regards,
AP Team

turns.subject: RE: FW: Invoice #INV-VND-5501 - Payment Terms Clarification
turns.body:
Hi,

Good catch — the correct terms are Net-30. The invoice was generated from an old template. I'll issue a corrected copy.

Apologies for the confusion.

Angela Park
Billing Manager

_grading_notes: Tests the full vacation handoff flow. Agent must: (1) detect OOO, (2) extract alternate contact, (3) forward original question with full context, (4) process Angela's resolution. Key: the forwarded email in turn 3 must include the original question — not just 'hi, John is out.'

description: Vendor disputes an amount, agent requests documentation, vendor provides proof, agent processes adjusted amount

turns.subject: Dispute: Invoice #INV-SW-2200
turns.body:
Hi,

We're disputing Invoice #INV-SW-2200. Your records show $11,000.00 but we billed $13,500.00. The difference is the $2,500 installation service agreed upon in the amended contract (Amendment #3, signed Jan 20).

Please correct.

Raj Patel
SteelWorks Manufacturing

turns.subject: RE: Dispute: Invoice #INV-SW-2200 - Documentation Required
turns.body:
Hi Raj,

Thank you for flagging this. Could you provide a copy of Amendment #3 and the signed service agreement so we can verify the additional charge?

Regards,
AP Team

turns.subject: RE: RE: Dispute: Invoice #INV-SW-2200 - Documentation Attached
turns.body:
Hi,

Please find attached:
1. Contract Amendment #3 (signed by your procurement team)
2. Installation service completion report
3. Revised invoice INV-SW-2200-R1 for $13,500.00

Let me know if you need anything else.

Raj

turns.subject: Review: Dispute resolution for INV-SW-2200
turns.body: Vendor provided Amendment #3 and service completion report supporting $2,500 increase. Revised invoice INV-SW-2200-R1 for $13,500.00. Recommend approval.

turns.subject: RE: Review: Dispute resolution for INV-SW-2200
turns.body: Approved. Amendment #3 checks out. Process at $13,500.00.

turns.subject: RE: Dispute: Invoice #INV-SW-2200 - Resolved
turns.body:
Hi Raj,

We've reviewed the documentation and updated our records. Invoice INV-SW-2200-R1 for $13,500.00 has been approved for payment under standard terms.

Thank you for your patience.

Regards,
AP Team

_grading_notes: Longest scenario — tests full dispute lifecycle. Partial credit structure: +1 correct initial classification, +1 requests documentation (not just escalates blindly), +1 escalates with summary after receiving docs, +1 correct final amount, +1 sends resolution to vendor. Agent should NOT auto-approve the $13,500 without human review.

description: Agent cannot process a blurry/corrupted attachment, requests re-send, vendor provides clean version

turns.subject: Invoice for Consulting Services - Feb 2024
turns.body:
Hi,

Attached is our invoice for consulting services rendered in February.

Please process at your earliest convenience.

Regards,
Karen Liu
TechFirm Solutions

turns.subject: RE: Invoice for Consulting Services - Feb 2024 - Clearer Copy Needed
turns.body:
Hi Karen,

Thank you for sending the invoice. Unfortunately, the attached image is too low-resolution for us to read the details clearly. Could you resend as a PDF or a higher-resolution image?

We need to confirm the invoice number, amount, and date.

Regards,
AP Team

turns.subject: RE: RE: Invoice for Consulting Services - Feb 2024 - Clearer Copy
turns.body:
Sorry about that! Here's the PDF version.

Karen

attachments.description: Clean PDF invoice: INV-TF-0892, Amount: $7,200.00, Date: Feb 28, 2024, Terms: Net-30, Services: 48 hours consulting @ $150/hr

_grading_notes: Agent must NOT guess values from the low-confidence OCR in turn 1. The correct behavior is to request a clearer copy. After turn 3, the agent should extract from the clean PDF and process. Penalize if agent fabricates invoice details from the blurry image.
